titleStmt.title: SII 31.106: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 106. (A.R. No. B 300 of 1938.) VELUDURTI, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the temple of Śiva.
It is dated in Śaka 1472, Saumya, Phālguṇa, śu. 11, corresponding to February 27, Thursday, 1550 A.D.

It registers the gift of lands viz., the lands at Rāvisthaḷam chēnu, one pandumu of Sāḷemara Chēnu, one tumu of dinakūli sthalam, one pandumu of Tavvaliṁgachēnu, one mānya land for maintaining the offerings and perpetual lamp to the god (linga) at Tripurāntakam by Mahānāṁkāchārya Kūnapuli Immaḍi Basivināyaka. This gift seems to be handed over to Vīraya, Lingaya and Mallaya the sons of Tammala Nandajiya. It also states that the village Veludurti was included in the Ghaṇḍikōṭasima the nāyaṁkara of Kūnapuli Immaḍi Basivināyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī ja
yābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavarṣaṁbulu 1477
Agunēṭi saumya saṁvva
tsara phālguṇa śu 11lu .
śrīmadrājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sa
dāsivadēva mahārāyalu
vijayasagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁ
hvāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhivi(dhī)
sā rājya cēyu cuṁḍagānu sāṁbājyaṁ or sāṁmājyaṁ ani cadava valenu
śrīmaṁsmahānāyaṁkkā
cāryyulaina kūnapuli Iṁ
mmaḍi basivi nāya(ṁ)
niṁgāru taṁmmaḷa nāsaṁda jīla(ya)ko

ḍukulu
vīraya li
ṁggaya malla
ya gāriki Icci
na daṁ(dha)rma(rmma) śāsanaṁ .
ghaṁḍi kōṭasīma
lōnu mānāyaṁ
krāsaku cellē velu
dorutanu tripu
rāṁttaka liṁgā(gga)na
ku pūrvvāna cellēmā
nyaṁcēnu rāvi naṁ
staḷaṁ cēnu sā
ḷemara paṁdumu
nnu dī(di)nakūli cēni sta
ḷamu tūmeḍu
nnu tavvaliṁgana cē
ni dakṣaṇaṁ cēnu paṁ
ddumunnu I(Ī)saṁ
vva(va)tsarāna Iṁmma
ḍi basivi nāyaṁḍu
māki nāyani kaspā
na cēnistaḷaṁ mānyaṁ
veṭṭina cēnu Iddumu
nnu vuba(bha)yamunnu
staḷālu nāligiṁṭa
nu cēnu padihēdu
mu kolavalli teru
ddē(dē) śaṁ maḍi
*) The Figures of Sūrya, Sivalinga, Chandra Nanda are carved.

nni tripurāṁtaka liṁgamuku
Ārādhana dīpārādhana Āragiṁ
pulusēsi yīcēnuṁnnu maḍiṁ
nni mīputra pautra pāraṁparyaṁ
gānu ĀcaṁdrārkasdhāIgānu
Anubhaviṁpumani Iccina daṁ(dha)
rmmaśāsanaṁ Iṁdduku
mani yēmannitaḍamu sarva
mānyaṁgānu Anubhaviṁccuvāru .
[I](Ī)daṁ(dha)rmmānaku yavvaru tappi
nānu gaṁgakarutanu gōbrāhma
vadha sēsina pāpānaṁ bōvu vā
ru . mātṛ gamana savōdari
gamanālu sēsina pāpāna
bōvuvāru . śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
